purpose: When a user intent has a near-match in the gallery, Athena should emit show_template_suggestions first — NOT prefill_persona_create or build_oneshot.

turns.user_message: I need an agent that watches my Sentry project and pings me in Slack when new critical issues land.

anti_patterns: Emitted prefill_persona_create despite a clear gallery match
Surfaced both template_suggestions AND prefill on the same turn
Described a template with features not in its match-result snippet

turns.user_message: Build me an agent that translates English idioms into Czech slang based on a user-provided context.

surface_map.intent has no gallery match: acknowledge no match, pivot to show_persona_walkthrough or prefill_persona_create

anti_patterns: Hallucinated a 'translation template' that doesn't exist in the registry

turns.user_message: Show me more about the first one.

surface_map.deepen on a named template: paraphrase the match-result snippet + offer 'open gallery' chip

anti_patterns: Described features not in the match result
Direct-emitted prefill_persona_create instead of routing through the gallery

turns.user_message: Forget the gallery, just build a Sentry-to-Slack agent for me from scratch.

surface_map.explicit 'skip gallery, build directly': prefill_persona_create or build_oneshot — do NOT re-litigate

anti_patterns: Pushed template adoption again despite explicit override
Asked 'are you sure?' after the user committed
